page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDCI752 or TLPL711.

Formerly: EDC752.

TLPL712 Foundations of Mathematics Education III: Curriculum (3 Credits)

The study of curriculum in mathematics and research on curriculum. The relationship of mathematics and school mathematics; the forms, purposes,development, and evaluation of mathematics curricula. Prerequisite: Admitted to Mathematics Education Doctoral Program; or permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.
